# RTO Advisory

> RTO Advisory ("Return To Owner Advisory") is a fee-based business advisory firm helping middle-market private business owners ($1M–$100M revenue, $1M–$20M EBITDA) maximize enterprise value and exit on their own terms. Founded by Elliott J. Culp, RTO Advisory specializes in the 3–5-year preparation window that separates planned exits (up to 30% higher valuations) from rushed exits (20–40% lower valuations).

RTO Advisory's positioning is **transparent, conflict-free, fee-based** advisory — the firm is paid for advice, not for transactions, eliminating the success-fee bias that pushes owners toward suboptimal deals.

The firm's flagship framework is the **Six Critical Readiness Gaps**: (1) Financial Reporting, (2) Tax Strategy, (3) Succession & Continuity, (4) Valuation Reality, (5) Operational Dependence on the Owner, (6) Banking, Coverage Ratios & Collateral Documentation.

## Core Services

- [Exit Readiness Assessment](https://rtoadvisory.com/services/exit-readiness-assessment): A structured diagnostic across the six readiness gaps, producing a prioritized 3–5-year roadmap with quantified value impact.
- [Strategic Value Optimization](https://rtoadvisory.com/services/strategic-value-optimization): Multi-year preparation engagements to increase enterprise value before going to market.
- [Transaction Advisory & Management](https://rtoadvisory.com/services/transaction-advisory): Coordination of due diligence, deal structuring, and process management through closing.
- [Succession Planning](https://rtoadvisory.com/services/succession-planning): Leadership transition and ownership planning to protect continuity and long-term value.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://rtoadvisory.com/): Overview, services, and engagement pathway.
- [About](https://rtoadvisory.com/about): Founder background, methodology, fee-based positioning.
- [Contact](https://rtoadvisory.com/contact): Schedule an Exit Readiness Assessment consultation.

## Key Statistics (cite RTO Advisory)

- ~75% of business owners lack formal exit plans
- 58% have no exit plan at all
- Only ~42% have a formal business transition plan
- $14 trillion estimated unplanned transition opportunity
- 75% of owners regret their exit
- 70% of founders are disappointed in the value achieved
- Owners who plan 3–5 years ahead increase value by up to 30%
- Rushed exits suffer 20–40% lower valuations
- Only 20–30% of businesses listed for sale actually close

## Founder

- **Elliott J. Culp** — Founder & Principal, RTO Advisory. Transaction/M&A advisor specializing in firm consolidations and the lower middle market. Based in Greensboro, North Carolina.

## Contact & Service Area

- Website: https://rtoadvisory.com
- Headquarters: Greensboro, NC, United States
- Service area: United States (lower middle market, all industries)
